zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah de Chesney於1167年出生在英國諾福爾可霍斯福德時，她的父親William de Chesney52歲，母親Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings31歲。她和Richard Engaine至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1222年4月在英國艾可可爾內 恩蓋享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah de Chesney于1167年出生在英国諾福爾可霍斯福德时，她的父亲William de Chesney52岁，母亲Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings31岁。她和Richard Engaine至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1222年4月在英国艾可可爾內 恩蓋享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chesney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim, Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh, see McChesney .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  , a cognate of 3 below.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’). Compare Cheney 2.

variants.name: McChesney
meanings: Scottish (Galloway) and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh ‘son of the Saxon (i.e. the Englishman)’. The spelling seems to represent Mac Shasanaigh, to be pronounced originally as McHasney, rather than the English spelling ch.

variants.name: Chestnut
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire) and northern Irish: altered form of Chesney , shortened from McChesney . Its assimilation to the English word chestnut is due to folk etymology, the word itself being first recorded in 1519. The surname was probably taken to Ireland at the time of the 17th-century Plantation of Ulster.
English (Norfolk): probably a variant of Chestney (see Chaney ), altered by folk etymological association with the word chestnut.

variants.name: Chesna
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Chesney  .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah de Chesney was born in 1167, in Horsford, Norfolk, England, her father, William de Chesney, was 52 and her mother, Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings, was 31. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Richard Engaine. She died in April 1222, in Colne Engaine, Essex, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah de Chesney est née en 1167, à Horsford, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William de Chesney, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Richard Engaine. Elle est décédée en avril 1222, à Colne Engaine, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah de Chesney 1167 in Horsford, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Chesney 52 und ihre Mutter Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings 31. Sie hatte mit Richard Engaine mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im April 1222 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Colne Engaine, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah de Chesney è nata il nel 1167 nel Horsford, Norfolk, England, sua padre, William de Chesney, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Richard Engaine. Morì nel aprile 1222, nel Colne Engaine, Essex, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah de Chesneyが1167年にイギリスノーフォルクホールスフォードで生まれた時，父William de Chesneyは52歳，母Albreda  Aubreye de Poyningsは31歳であった。彼女はRichard Engaineとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1222年4月にイギリスエセックスコルン エンガインで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah de Chesney(이)가 1167년 영국 노르폴크 호르스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Chesney(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Richard Engaine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 4월 영국 에세스 코니 잉가인에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah de Chesney nasceu em 1167, em Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Chesney, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Richard Engaine. Ela faleceu em abril de 1222, em Colne Engaine, Essex, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah de Chesney родилась в 1167 г. в местности хаурсфорд, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Chesney было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings, 31. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Richard Engaine. Она умерла апрель 1222 г. в местности колн энгеин, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah de Chesney nació en 1167, en Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Chesney, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Albreda  Aubreye de Poynings, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Richard Engaine. Murió en abril de 1222, en Colne Engaine, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
